Localization.Description: Logon to internal resources under another users account. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host}, which belongs to another user {datafield11}, logged in to host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} has changed the name of the source node {src.host}, from which he entered the node {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host}, owned by another user {datafield11}, logged into host {event_src.host} for the first time
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host}, which belongs to another user {datafield11}, logged in to host {dst.host}
